This species is a type of terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on land rather than in water or on other plants. The classification of Cestichis serrulata also includes it being a member of the genus Cestichis, which is part of the subfamily Cranichideae. Further classification places it in the family Orchidaceae and the order Asparagales.
